<details open>

graph: Fix granite speech model inference by applying embedding scale when deepstack is not used (#24357)

* llama-graph : apply embedding scale when deepstack is not used

* nits: remove non-existant hunyuan-vl from the tests

* apply suggestion from @gabe-l-hart

---------

Co-authored-by: Xuan Son Nguyen <son@huggingface.co>

</details>

**macOS/iOS:**
- [macOS Apple Silicon (arm64)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b9585/llama-b9585-bin-macos-arm64.tar.gz)

- [iOS XCFramework](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b9585/llama-b9585-xcframework.zip)

**Linux:**

- [Ubuntu s390x (CPU)](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/download/b9585/llama-b9585-bin-ubunt
